data.title: Fitt's Law
data.description: Predicts the thinking and movement time involved in making an action.
data.technical_spec: Clickable elements are large and easy to click even on small devices.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: More options increase the decision time.
data.technical_spec: Simple and intuitive UI with prioritized search results.

data.title: Doherty Threshold
data.description: Productivity soars when a computer and its users interact at a pace (<400 ms) that ensures neither has to wait on the other.
data.technical_spec: Sub-400ms response time for user actions and page loads.

data.title: Peak-End Rule
data.description: Judgments of past experiences are based on a combination of their peaks and how they ended.
data.technical_spec: Consistent positive experience; fast-loading SERPs with relevant results.

data.title: Tesler's Law
data.description: A system’s ease-of-use is often inversely related to its complexity or functionality.
data.technical_spec: Minimalistic design while preserving advanced functionalities like voice search.
